title: First Steps in Water Seven
description: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
scene: Across pages 6, 7, 8, 9, this part follows Kaku, Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Iceburg. Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You don't need to Apolo- Gize...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Eh...!? Should I take a look?

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: I'm feeling uneasy about what Aokiji said...

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: He talked about Nico Robin's past and...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I hope she went back there safely...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: You can't fix going Going Merry!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What's Wrong With Going Going Merry?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's on the bottom of the ship...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then the head, the tail, the spine...

summary: Usopp’s attachment to the Going Merry turns the repair verdict into a personal crisis that separates him emotionally from the crew.
